\tzpentry{ID3527}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3527 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ R=\frac{x_1+x_2}{2}\qquad\text{(center of mass)},\qquad r=x_1-x_2\qquad\text{(relative coordinate)}. \]
